title: Tickle Time!

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
a single or multi-message switch
record:
"tickle me!" on it

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. Each time the switch user hits their switch, tickle them for 5 seconds.
2. Encourage them to press again by asking questions like "Shall we do more tickles?" or "I wonder if you want to do that again!"

tooltipText: Activate a switch to ask for tickles!
